SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-30-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DANIEL HOWARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 1700 CALIFORNIA STREET ASSOCIATES, LP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ZACHARY JACOB, ASSISTANT PROPERTY MANAGER AND EZEQUIEL CAZARES REGIONAL DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT GO-MOSSER 1700 CALIFORNIA GP, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFFS DANIEL HOWARD AND J. KELLY HOWARD ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS 1700 CALIFORNIA STREET ASSOCIATES, LP AND GO MOSSER 1700 CALIFORNIA GP, LLC REPRESENTED BY ZACHARY JACOBS, ASSISTANT PROPERTY MANAGER AND DARWIN GARZA, SR. MULTISITE PROPERTY MANAGER ARE PRESENT. THE RELATED CASE CSM-20-863820 J. KELLY HOWARD VS. 1700 CALIFORNIA STREET ASSOCIATES, LP ET AL IS HEARD AT THE SAME TIME. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWARD, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 1700 CALIFORNIA STREET ASSOCIATES, LP GO-MOSSER 1700 CALIFORNIA GP, LLC $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,105.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
